ddls:
CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_code" INTEGER /* Unique code representing the educational board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational board */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the board */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number for the board */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the board */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number for the board */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the board serves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Unique code identifying each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "board_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the board the school belongs to */,
  "mail_address_line1" TEXT /* Mailing address line 1 */,
  "mail_address_line2" TEXT /* Mailing address line 2 */,
  "mailing_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for mailing address */,
  "civic_address_line1" TEXT /* Civic address line 1 */,
  "civic_address_line2" TEXT /* Civic address line 2 */,
  "civic_postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code for civic address */,
  "telephone" TEXT /* Telephone number of the school */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "school_website" TEXT /* Website of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., Elementary, Secondary) */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Grade range offered by the school */,
  "school_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_board_code FOREIGN KEY ("board_code") REFERENCES boards ("board_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address change event */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school whose address is changed */,
  "old_address_line1" TEXT /* Previous address line 1 */,
  "old_address_line2" TEXT /* Previous address line 2 */,
  "old_postal_code" TEXT /* Previous postal code */,
  "new_address_line1" TEXT /* New address line 1 */,
  "new_address_line2" TEXT /* New address line 2 */,
  "new_postal_code" TEXT /* New postal code */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the address change occurred */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the address change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_changes_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year of enrollment */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the enrollment data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_enrollment_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type (e.g., Elementary, Secondary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "grade_range" TEXT /* Typical grade range for this school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_type_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of school */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the school type assignment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_type_assignments_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_type_assignments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "contact_position" TEXT /* Position of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person (e.g., Principal, Vice-Principal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_events_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken by the user */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_management ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility (e.g., Gymnasium, Library) */,
  "facility_description" TEXT /* Description of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_facilities_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)
